recommendations.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Mt. Natagumo Arc
recommendations.overview: Tanjiro, now a registered Demon Slayer, teams up with fellow slayers Zenitsu and Inosuke to investigate missing person cases on the mountain Natagumo. After the group is split up during a battle with possessed swordfighters, they slowly begin to real

recommendations.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle
recommendations.overview: The Demon Slayer Corps are drawn into the Infinity Castle, where Tanjiro, Nezuko, and the Hashira face terrifying Upper Rank demons in a desperate fight as the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji begins.

recommendations.title: The Secret World of Arrietty
recommendations.overview: 14-year-old Arrietty and the rest of the Clock family live in peaceful anonymity as they make their own home from items "borrowed" from the house's human inhabitants. However, life changes for the Clocks when a human boy discovers Arrietty.

recommendations.title: The Emperor's New Groove
recommendations.overview: Emperor Kuzco is turned into a llama by his ex-administrator Yzma, and must now regain his throne and his human form with the help of Pacha, a gentle llama herder.
